name: Singular Asset Mgmt Admgral De Fondos Sa - Fondo de Inversion Singular Oaktree Real Estate Income
summary: Singular Asset Mgmt Admgral De Fondos Sa - Fondo de Inversion Singular Oaktree Real Estate Income invests in real estate income-producing assets through a partnership with Oaktree Capital Management. Singular Asset Mgmt Admgral De Fondos Sa manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio of real estate properties and related investments.
